title: Sampling & Beatmaking on the SP-404 MK2
subtitle: MUS-45H · A 3-week hardware sampling intensive
description: Go from never having touched a sampler to making real beats on the Roland SP-404 MK2. A hands-on course in hardware sampling: getting sound in and out, recording and trimming a sample, chopping a break, building a drum kit, programming the pattern sequencer, resampling, the SP's signature effects, and arranging it all into a finished track. Built for the absolute beginner, taught through daily lectures, machine time, quizzes, and three production projects. Pairs with MUS-40H, the machine-operation course.

lessons.title: Field Guide: The Machine, Shortcuts & Resources
Days 1–7: Signal Flow, Playing Pads, Recording, Trimming, Pitch, Your First Loop
Days 8–14: Chopping, Finger Drumming, Drum Kits, the Sequencer, Groove, Resampling
Days 15–21: Effects, Bass & Melody, Arrangement, Mixing, Your Finished Track
